  • Overview
  • Tree
  • Index
  • Search
  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Armor
    Represents an Armor item that provides protection to the hero.
    ArmorName
    Enumeration listing the specific names of all armor pieces available in the game.
    ArmorType
    Enumeration defining the broad categories of armor.
    BackPack
    Represents the hero's inventory (Backpack).
    BackPackController
    Controller for managing the Backpack organization interface.
    BackPackView
    Handles the graphical presentation of the player's Backpack (Inventory).
    BattleRoom
    Represents a room where a fight takes place.
    BattleRoomController
    Controller responsible for the Battle Room logic.
    BattleRoomView
    Handles the graphical rendering of the Battle scene.
    BattleState
    Represents the status of a battle.
    Character
    Interface representing a character in the game (Hero or Enemy).
    Coordinate
    Represents a 2D coordinate in a grid system (x, y).
    Corridor
    A simple room that connects other rooms.
    Cost
    Represents the cost required to use an item.
    DongeonGame
    Represents the state and logic of a single dungeon floor game session.
    Enemy
    Represents an Enemy in the game.
    EnemyActionType
    Enum representing the possible types of actions an enemy can take.
    EnemyType
    Enum listing all possible enemy types in the game.
    EventEnemy
    Represents an intended action by an enemy for the next turn.
    ExitRoom
    The room that allows the hero to leave the floor.
    ExitRoomController
    Controller for the Exit Room interaction.
    ExitRoomView
    Manages the view for the Exit Room (the end of a level/floor).
    Fight
    Manages the fight logic/state between a Hero and an Enemy.
    FightResult
    The result of a round of fighting.
    Floor
    Represents a single floor of the dungeon.
    FloorView
    Renders the mini-map or floor map of the dungeon.
    Gold
    Represents Gold (currency) in the game.
    HallOfFame
    Manages the high scores of the game (Hall of Fame).
    HallOfFameController
    Controller for displaying the Hall of Fame (High Scores).
    HallOfFameView
    Represents the view for the Hall of Fame screen.
    HealRoom
    A room where the hero can pay gold to heal.
    HealRoomController
    Controller for the Heal Room.
    HealRoomView
    Displays the Sanctuary/Heal Room interface.
    Hero
    Represents the main character played by the user.
    HeroActionType
    Enum listing the types of actions a hero can perform during a fight.
    HeroType
    Enum listing the playable hero classes/types.
    ImageLoader
    Utility class to load and cache images from a specified directory.
    Item
    Sealed interface defining the common behavior of all items in the game.
    ItemEmpty
    Represents an empty space in a grid that acts as an item placeholder.
    ItemEnum
    Enumeration categorizing all item types within the game hierarchy.
    LastActions
    Stores the details of the last turn in a fight.
    Level
    Manages character progression, including current level, experience (XP), and thresholds.
    Main
    Entry point of the application.
    MainTitleController
    Controller for the Main Title Screen.
    MainTitleView
     
    MainTitleView.MenuButton
    Represents a clickable button on the main menu.
    ManaStone
    Represents a Mana Stone item.
    ManaStones
    Enumeration representing the different types of Mana Stones.
    MapController
    Controller responsible for the main map navigation.
    MoveResult
    The result of a move action by the hero.
    Node
    Represents a node in the pathfinding graph.
    Rarity
    Enumeration defining the rarity levels of items.
    Relic
    Represents a Relic item.
    RelicEnum
    Enumeration listing all available Relics in the game.
    Room
    The interface for all rooms in the dungeon.
    ShopRoom
    Represents a shop in the dungeon.
    ShopRoomController
    Controller managing the interactions within a Shop Room.
    ShopRoomView
     
    Slot
    Represents an empty slot in the inventory grid.
    SurpriseRoom
     
    TreasureRoom
    Represents a room full of treasures.
    TreasureRoomController
    Controller handling the logic inside a Treasure Room.
    TreasureRoomView
    Handles the graphical display of the Treasure Room.
    TypeCost
    Enumeration representing the different types of resources or costs.
    TypeRoom
    Enumeration of all possible room types.
    UserInterface
    Acts as the central manager for the game session.
    Wall
    Represents a wall between two rooms in the dungeon.
    Weapon
    Represents a weapon item that allows the hero to deal damage.
    WeaponName
     
    WeaponSelection
    Stores the selection of a weapon and its damage.
    WeaponType
